title: The Crew Regroups Under Disaster
description: Upper Yard’s ruins and the great bell grow more important as the battle connects Skypiea’s present to its buried past.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this scene centers on Luffy, Nola, Enel, Nami, Aisa. Upper Yard’s ruins and the great bell grow more important as the battle connects Skypiea’s present to its buried past.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm leaving them to you, Sue!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This isn't the time to cry!!

dialogue.speaker: Aisa
dialogue.text: Let's orchestrate the final act together!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: UNIT 3, GO!! USOPP'S SPACE GALLERY PIRATES!!

summary: Upper Yard’s ruins and the great bell grow more important as the battle connects Skypiea’s present to its buried past.
